entity.description: A priest who assisted in the dedication of the walls of Jerusalem (Neh. 12:42).

nodes.label: Uzzi
nodes.description: A priest who assisted in the dedication of the walls of Jerusalem (Neh. 12:42).

verses.text: And Maaseiah, and Shemaiah, and Eleazar, and Uzzi, and Jehohanan, and Malchijah, and Elam, and Ezer. And the singers sang loud, with Jezrahiah their overseer.
